# BP-100 negative variant: a worker receives range items through a queue
lang: go
file: BP-100-variant-safe.go
---
package sample

type job struct {
	name string
}

func handleJobs(items []job, queue chan<- job) {
	for _, item := range items {
		queue <- item
	}
	go worker(queue)
}

func worker(queue <-chan job) {}
